title: cells claim re-backed by O_EXCL claim file + session-id self-derivation (D1+D3)
action: FREEZE FIRST: run test_lib.mjs + test_bee_cli.mjs green, record output. Per D3: export resolveSessionId({flag}) from claims.mjs — precedence explicit flag -> CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID env -> null; claim-next keeps --session-id. Per D1 (Δ2-amended): claimCell acquires the claim file via claimCellFile FIRST (typed CLAIMED refusal naming owner session + expiry), then mutates cell JSON. claimCellFile session requirement deliberately relaxed: sessionless single-user claims allowed; releaseClaim owner check handles absent session. CORRECTION (plan-check): NO existing release on cap/unclaim — releaseClaim has exactly one caller today (claim-next unwind, cells.mjs:831). REQUIRED: release the claim file on EVERY claim-clearing transition — capCell, unclaimCell, blockCell, dropCell, reopenCell — else a same-session block/drop->reopen->claim self-refuses CLAIMED for the full TTL. Forked-racer scripts/test_claim_race.mjs: N concurrent cells claim --id X -> exactly 1 winner, N-1 typed CLAIMED; plus a claim->block->reopen->claim same-session round-trip proving no self-refusal. Existing rows byte-unchanged (freeze). Manifest --write + --check.

truths: single-session flow (no env id) still claims successfully
loser refusal names owner and expiry
